Name: Randall
Description: Randall was a member of Xavier's Security Enforcers, along with Bishop, Malcolm, and many others from The Days of Future Past Timeline (Earth-1191). He traveled back in time to stop Trevor Fitzroy (and as later retconned, Hope Summers), but he lost his life before he could complete his mission.
